readiness_boundary.reason: hardening plan is actionable management metadata, not evidence that public production readiness has passed

hardening_plan.label: Public exposure
blocked_by: run public-stack security review before opening edge routes
keep localhost public origin and placeholder secrets as blockers
guardrails: localhost public origin remains a blocker for public exposure
placeholder secrets remain blockers for public exposure
security review, onboarding check, and published-image dry-run must be visible before real exposure

stages.label: Prove public-stack safety gates
stages.done_when: security review, onboarding, and smoke evidence are available

stages.label: Export operator evidence
stages.done_when: handoff/evidence payload is safe to share

hardening_plan.label: Billing production readiness
blocked_by: finish billing production gates before presenting billing as a default-ready surface
guardrails: billing can be visible to operators without being presented as default production-ready
billing production gates belong in the platform owning repository

stages.label: Define billing production readiness gate
stages.done_when: owning repo and acceptance evidence are explicit

stages.label: Prove billing production readiness evidence
stages.done_when: gate evidence is available from owning-repo checks

stages.label: Wire billing production readiness into operator surfaces
stages.done_when: management surfaces can show the gate without claiming production readiness

hardening_plan.label: Email transport production readiness
blocked_by: finish email transport and marketplace production gates before claiming public production readiness
guardrails: email transport readiness must remain separate from daily local deployability
email transport gates belong in the owning client repository

stages.label: Define email transport production readiness gate
stages.done_when: owning repo and acceptance evidence are explicit

stages.label: Prove email transport production readiness evidence
stages.done_when: gate evidence is available from owning-repo checks

stages.label: Wire email transport production readiness into operator surfaces
stages.done_when: management surfaces can show the gate without claiming production readiness

hardening_plan.label: Marketplace production readiness
blocked_by: finish email transport and marketplace production gates before claiming public production readiness
guardrails: marketplace readiness is not implied by local daily deployability
marketplace gates must be proven in the owning formal repositories

stages.label: Define marketplace production readiness gate
stages.done_when: owning repo and acceptance evidence are explicit

stages.label: Prove marketplace production readiness evidence
stages.done_when: gate evidence is available from owning-repo checks

stages.label: Wire marketplace production readiness into operator surfaces
stages.done_when: management surfaces can show the gate without claiming production readiness

hardening_plan.label: Formal package and image release
blocked_by: keep formal npm/image release gates in the owning repositories
guardrails: formal npm and image release gates stay in the owning repositories
the fourth repo certifies compatible source combinations, not formal package or image releases

stages.label: Define owning-repo release gates
stages.done_when: formal npm/image release gate ownership is explicit

stages.label: Prove package and image release candidates
stages.done_when: published image plan and operation regression evidence are available

stages.label: Wire release evidence into management surfaces
stages.done_when: operators can see the release gate without treating it as daily readiness

safety_defaults: deployability hardening plan is read-only and does not read .env files directly
deployability hardening plan only calls read-only roadmap metadata
deployability hardening plan does not call Docker, bind ports, or probe network endpoints
JSON output describes owner repos, stages, blockers, guardrails, and evidence commands without printing secret values
notes: use this when a management surface needs an actionable production-hardening plan without claiming production readiness
direct input is roadmap metadata; production, gates, and status commands are stage guidance only and are not executed
